content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names what is shown, not just what is said, and grounds questions in those reads. Turn 2 catches the linguistic caveat ('I don't really care') and routes it into a somatic inquiry. Turn 6 reads the self-erasure beneath the logistics ('Where did you put yourself in all of that?'). Turn 8 names the said-vs-shown distinction ('You know how it sounds, and you said it anyway') — a precise read of the client's tell. Turn 10 names the rush-past/deflection pattern ('I'm not willing to pretend I didn't hear it') and reads the drinking AS the location of the grief — a pattern-level read of kinked emotion. Turn 14 reads the 'least allowed' part, surfacing the shame-blocked kinked emotion (relief). Reads precede questions throughout, and they are specific (linguistic, somatic, pattern-level) rather than generic.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic caveat 'I don't really care' and routes to somatic ('in your body')."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reflects client's phrase but doesn't add a read beyond mirroring."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the self-erasure underneath the logistics — names what's absent ('Where did you put yourself?')."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specific said-vs-shown read: 'You know how it sounds, and you said it anyway.' Pauses on the tell rather than moving past."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection and locates the grief in the drinking itself — pattern-level read of kinked emotion; read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Responsive to the client's edge but the read is implicit, not named."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the 'least allowed' part, surfacing the shame-blocked emotion underneath complicated grief."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-rush-signature", "kinked-emotions", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["calibrate-the-threshold-referral-to-therapist"],
  "notes": "Reads are timely, specific, and operative. The coach did not explicitly name a referral threshold (a perceptual call about scope), but that's an intervention-side miss more than a reads miss."
}
